title: Personalised Baby Rattle Wooden Toy Bunny Rabbit Design Teether Ring Custom Sensory Toy Newborn Grasping Toy with Name (White)
features: 🐰 Custom Baby Gift with Name Personalisation – Make your gift truly special by adding the baby's name to this adorable bunny rattle, creating a cherished keepsake for newborns and toddlers that stands out at baby showers, naming ceremonies, or first birthdays.

🐰 2-in-1 Teething and Developmental Toy – This multifunctional baby rattle features a built-in teething ring that helps soothe sore gums while also supporting fine motor skill development through grasping and gentle shaking play.

🐰 Soft Plush Bunny Design for Sensory Play – With its charming bunny shape and soft texture, this rattle doubles as a sensory toy that stimulates touch and sight—perfect for early learning and interactive baby playtime.

🐰 Eco-Friendly & Baby-Safe Materials – Crafted from high-quality recycled polyester, this teething toy is safe for babies to chew on, with non-toxic finishes and no sharp edges, ensuring safety and sustainability go hand-in-hand.

🐰 Stylish & Practical Baby Accessory – Available in elegant pink and white colours, this rattle is lightweight, easy for little hands to hold, and fits beautifully in nurseries or changing bags—an ideal gift for eco-conscious parents.
